  public final class Future {

    private enum State {
      case pending
      case resolved(any Vx_Core.Type_any)
    }

    private var valtype : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.t_any
    private var state : State = .pending
    private var callbacks : [(any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> Void] = []

    public init() {}

    public init(
      _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) {
      self.valtype = generic_any_1
    }

    public func getValue(
    ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let lock = NSLock()
      lock.lock()
      var output : any Vx_Core.Type_any
      if case .resolved(let value) = state {
        output = value
      } else {
        output = Vx_Core.vx_empty(self.valtype)
      }
      lock.unlock()
      return output
    }

    public func getValueSync(
    ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return getValueSync(timeout: DispatchTime.now() + .seconds(5))
    }

    public func getValueSync(
      timeout : DispatchTime
    ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      var result : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.vx_empty(self.valtype)
      let semaphore = DispatchSemaphore(value: 0)
      onComplete { value in
        let lock = NSLock()
        lock.lock()
        result = value
        lock.unlock()
        semaphore.signal()
      }
      if !isResolved() {
        let status = semaphore.wait(timeout: timeout)
        if status == .timedOut {
          print("Warning: Future.getValueSync() timed out")
        }
      }
      return result
    }

    public func isResolved() -> Bool {
      let lock = NSLock()
      lock.lock()
      var output : Bool = false
      if case .resolved = state {
        output = true
      }
      lock.unlock()
      return output
    }

    public func resolve(
      _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) {
      let lock = NSLock()
      guard case .pending = state else {
        lock.unlock()
        return
      }
      state = .resolved(value)
      let localCallbacks = callbacks
      callbacks.removeAll()
      lock.unlock()
      for cb in localCallbacks {
        cb(value)
      }
    }

    public func onComplete(
      _ fn : @escaping (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> Void
    ) {
      let lock = NSLock()
      lock.lock()
      switch state {
      case .resolved(let value):
        lock.unlock()
        fn(value)
      case .pending:
        callbacks.append(fn)
        lock.unlock()
      }
    }

    public func map(
      _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ fn : @escaping (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
      let output = Vx_Core.Future(generic_any_1)
      onComplete { value in
        let mappedValue = fn(value)
        output.resolve(mappedValue)
      }
      return output
    }

    public func flatMap(
      _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ fn : @escaping (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> Vx_Core.Future
    ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
      let output = Vx_Core.Future(generic_any_1)
      onComplete { value in
        let innerFuture = fn(value)
        innerFuture.onComplete { result in
          output.resolve(result)
        }
      }
      return output
    }

    public static func resolved(
      _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
      var output : Vx_Core.Future = Vx_Core.Future(generic_any_1)
      output.resolve(value)
      return output
    }

    public static func all(
      _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ futures : [Vx_Core.Future]
    ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
      let output = Vx_Core.Future(generic_any_1)
      let count = futures.count
      if count == 0 {
        let emptyValue = generic_any_1.vx_empty()
        output.resolve(emptyValue)
      } else {
        let empty = Vx_Core.e_any
        var results = [any Vx_Core.Type_any](repeating: empty, count: count)
        var remaining = count
        let lock = NSLock()
        for (index, future) in futures.enumerated() {
          future.onComplete { value in
            lock.lock()
            results[index] = value
            remaining = remaining - 1
            let isDone = (remaining == 0)
            lock.unlock()
            if isDone {
              let finalResult = generic_any_1.vx_new(results)
              output.resolve(finalResult)
            }
          }
        }
        lock.lock()
        let allCompleted = (remaining == 0)
        lock.unlock()
        if allCompleted {
          let finalResult = generic_any_1.vx_new(results)
          output.resolve(finalResult)
        }
      }
      return output
    }

  }

  public struct Map<V> {

    private var dict : [String : V]
    private var keylist : [String]

    // Empty map
    public init() {
      self.dict = [:]
      self.keylist = []
    }

    public init(
      _ dict: [String : V],
      _ keylist: [String]
    ) {
      self.dict = dict
      self.keylist = keylist
    }

    public init(
      _ other : Vx_Core.MapMutable<V>
    ) {
      self.dict = other.rawmap()
      self.keylist = other.keys()
    }

    public init(
      _ other : Vx_Core.MapMutable<any Vx_Core.Type_any>
    ) {
      let keys : [String] = other.keys()
      var rawmap : [String : any Vx_Core.Type_any] = other.rawmap()
      self.dict = [:]
      self.keylist = keys
      for key in keys {
        if let value = rawmap as? V {
          self.dict[key] = value
          self.keylist.append(key)
        }
      }
    }

    // Copy (returns self because it's immutable)
    public func copy() -> Vx_Core.Map<V> {
      return self
    }

    // Accessors
    public func get(
      _ key : String
    ) -> V {
      return dict[key]!
    }

    public func getOrDefault(
      _ key : String
    ) -> V? {
      return dict[key]
    }

    public func getOrElse(
      _ key : String,
      _ elsevalue : V
    ) -> V {
      return dict[key] ?? elsevalue
    }

    public func keys() -> [String] {
      return keylist
    }

    public func rawmap() -> [String : V] {
      return dict
    }

    public func size() -> Int {
      return dict.count
    }

  }

  public struct MapMutable<V> {

    private var dict : [String : V]
    private var keylist : [String]

    // Empty map
    public init() {
      self.dict = [:]
      self.keylist = []
    }

    public init(
      _ dict: [String : V],
      _ keylist: [String]
    ) {
      self.dict = dict
      self.keylist = keylist
    }

    public init(
      _ other : Vx_Core.Map<V>
    ) {
      self.dict = other.rawmap()
      self.keylist = other.keys()
    }

    public init(
      _ other : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any>
    ) {
      self.dict = [:]
      let keys : [String] = other.keys()
      var rawmap : [String : any Vx_Core.Type_any] = other.rawmap()
      self.keylist = keys
      for key in keys {
        if let value = rawmap[key] as? V {
          self.dict[key] = value
          self.keylist.append(key)
        }
      }
    }

    public init(
      _ other : Vx_Core.MapMutable<Vx_Core.Type_any>
    ) {
      self.dict = [:]
      self.keylist = other.keys()
      for key in other.keylist {
        if let value = other.dict[key] as? V {
          self.dict[key] = value
          self.keylist.append(key)
        }
      }
    }

    // Copy
    public func copy() -> Vx_Core.MapMutable<V> {
      return Vx_Core.MapMutable<V>(self.dict, self.keylist)
    }

    // Accessors
    public func get(
      _ key : String
    ) -> V {
      return dict[key]!
    }

    public func getOrDefault(
      _ key : String
    ) -> V? {
      return dict[key]
    }

    public func getOrElse(
      _ key : String,
      _ elsevalue : V
    ) -> V {
      return dict[key] ?? elsevalue
    }

    public func keys() -> [String] {
      return keylist
    }

    public func rawmap() -> [String : V] {
      return dict
    }

    public func size() -> Int {
      return dict.count
    }

    public mutating func put(
      _ key : String,
      _ value : V
    ) {
      if dict[key] == nil {
        keylist.append(key)
      }
      dict[key] = value
    }

    public mutating func remove(_ key : String) {
      dict.removeValue(forKey : key)
      keylist.removeAll { $0 == key }
    }

  }

  public protocol Type_replfunc {
    func vx_repl(_ arglist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist) -> Vx_Core.Type_any
  }

  public protocol Type_replfunc_async {
    func vx_repl(_ arglist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist) -> Vx_Core.Future
  }

  public static let emptylistany : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = []

  public static let emptymapany : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any> = Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any>()

  open class Class_base {

    internal var vx_iref : Int = 0
    public var vx_p_constdef : Vx_Core.Type_constdef? = nil
    internal var vxmsgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock? = nil

    open func vx_new(
      _ vals : [Any]
    ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return Vx_Core.e_any
    }

    open func vx_copy(
      _ vals : [Any]
    ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return Vx_Core.e_any
    }

    open func vx_empty() -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return Vx_Core.e_any
    }

    open func vx_type() -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
      return Vx_Core.t_any
    }

    open func vx_typedef() -> any Vx_Core.Type_typedef {
      return Vx_Core.e_typedef
    }

    public func vx_constdef() -> any Vx_Core.Type_constdef {
      return vx_p_constdef ?? Vx_Core.e_constdef
    }

    public func vx_dispose() -> [any Vx_Core.Type_any] {
      vx_iref = 0
      vx_p_constdef = nil
      vxmsgblock = nil
      return emptylistany
    }

    public func vx_msgblock() -> any Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
      return vxmsgblock ?? Vx_Core.e_msgblock
    }

    public func vx_release() -> Bool {
      if vx_iref < 0 {
        return false
      } else if vx_iref == 0 {
        vx_iref = -1
        return true
      } else {
        vx_iref -= 1
        return false
      }
    }

    public func vx_reserve() {
      vx_iref += 1
    }
  }

  public struct KeyValue<T> {
    public var key: String = ""
    public var value: T? = nil
  }

  func keyValueFromKeyValue<T>(_ key : String, _ value : T) -> KeyValue<T> {
    return KeyValue(key: key, value: value)
  }

  public static func constdef_new(
    _ pkgname: String,
    _ name: String,
    _ typ: Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_constdef {
    let output: Vx_Core.Class_constdef = Vx_Core.Class_constdef()
    output.vx_p_pkgname = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(pkgname)
    output.vx_p_name = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(name)
    output.vx_p_type = typ
    return output
  }

  public static func funcdef_new(
    _ pkgname : String,
    _ name : String,
    _ idx : Int,
    _ async : Bool,
    _ typ : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_funcdef {
    let output : Vx_Core.Class_funcdef = Vx_Core.Class_funcdef()
    output.vx_p_pkgname = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(pkgname)
    output.vx_p_name = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(name)
    output.vx_p_idx = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(idx)
    output.vx_p_async = Vx_Core.vx_new_boolean(async)
    output.vx_p_type = typ
    return output
  }

  public static func f_new<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ values : [any Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> T {
    let result : any Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_any_1.vx_new(values)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, result)
    return output
  }

  public static func arraylist_from_arraylist(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> [any Vx_Core.Type_any] {
    var output : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
    for value in listval {
      let t_val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
      output.append(t_val)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func arraylist_from_arraylist_fn(
    _ listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any],
    _ fn_any_from_any: (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> [any Vx_Core.Type_any] {
    var output: [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
    for value_u : any Vx_Core.Type_any in listval {
      let t_val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_any_from_any(value_u)
      output.append(t_val)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func arraylist_from_linkedhashmap<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any,
    U : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ mapval : Vx_Core.Map<U>
  ) -> [T] {
    var list : [T] = []
    let keys : [String] = mapval.keys()
    for key : String in keys {
      let u_val : U = mapval.get(key)
      let t_val : T = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, u_val)
      list.append(t_val)
    }
    let output = list
    return output
  }

  public static func arraylist_from_linkedhashmap_fn<T, U>(
    _ mapval : Vx_Core.Map<U>,
    _ fn_any_from_key_value : (String, U) -> T
  ) -> [T] {
    var list : [T] = []
    let keys : [String] = mapval.keys()
    for key : String in keys {
      let u_val : U = mapval.get(key)
      let t_val : T = fn_any_from_key_value(key, u_val)
      list.append(t_val)
    }
    let output = list
    return output
  }

  public static func typedef_new(
    _ pkgname: String,
    _ name: String,
    _ extend: String,
    _ traits: Vx_Core.Type_typelist,
    _ allowtypes: Vx_Core.Type_typelist,
    _ disallowtypes: Vx_Core.Type_typelist,
    _ allowfuncs: Vx_Core.Type_funclist,
    _ disallowfuncs: Vx_Core.Type_funclist,
    _ allowvalues: Vx_Core.Type_anylist,
    _ disallowvalues: Vx_Core.Type_anylist,
    _ properties: Vx_Core.Type_argmap
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_typedef {
    let output : Vx_Core.Class_typedef = Vx_Core.Class_typedef()
    output.vx_p_pkgname = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(pkgname)
    output.vx_p_name = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(name)
    output.vx_p_extend = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(extend)
    output.vx_p_traits = traits
    output.vx_p_allowtypes = allowtypes
    output.vx_p_disallowtypes = disallowtypes
    output.vx_p_allowfuncs = allowfuncs
    output.vx_p_disallowfuncs = disallowfuncs
    output.vx_p_allowvalues = allowvalues
    output.vx_p_disallowvalues = disallowvalues
    output.vx_p_properties = properties
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_listimmutable<T>(
    _ listval : [T]
  ) -> [T] {
    return listval
  }

  public static func vx_map_from_map<T, U>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ map : Vx_Core.Map<U>
  ) -> Vx_Core.Map<T> {
    let keys : [String] = map.keys()
    var result : [String : T] = [:]
    for key : String in map.keys() {
      if let valueu : U = map.getOrDefault(key) {
        if let valuet : T = valueu as? T {
          result[key] = valuet
        }
      }
    }
    let output : Vx_Core.Map<T> = Vx_Core.Map<T>(result, keys)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_mapimmutable<T>(
    _ mapval : Vx_Core.MapMutable<T>
  ) -> Vx_Core.Map<T> {
    let output : Vx_Core.Map<T> = Vx_Core.Map<T>(
      mapval.rawmap(),
      mapval.keys()
    )
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_mapmutable<T>(
    _ mapval : Vx_Core.Map<T>
  ) -> Vx_Core.MapMutable<T> {
    let output : Vx_Core.MapMutable<T> = Vx_Core.MapMutable<T>(
      mapval.rawmap(),
      mapval.keys()
    )
    return output
  }

  // vx_new(generic_any_1, args...)
  public static func vx_new<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> T {
    let arrayany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = Vx_Core.vx_arrayany_from_anylist(
      values
    )
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_any_1.vx_new(arrayany)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, val)
    return output
  }

  // vx_new(generic_any_1, args...)
  public static func vx_new<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ vals : [Any]
  ) -> T {
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_any_1.vx_new(vals)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, val)
    return output
  }

  // vx_copy(generic_any_1, args...)
  public static func vx_copy<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ values : [Any]
  ) -> T {
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = value.vx_copy(values)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, val)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_copy<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> T {
    let anyoutput = Vx_Core.vx_copy(generic_any_1, value, [values])
    let output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, anyoutput)
    return output
  }

  // vx_empty(generic_any_1)
  public static func vx_empty<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ type : T
  ) -> T {
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = type.vx_empty()
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(type, val)
    return output
  }

  // vx_type(generic_any_1)
  public static func vx_type<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ type : T
  ) -> T {
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = type.vx_type()
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(type, val)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_allowtypes_from_typedef(
    _ vtypedef : any Vx_Core.Type_typedef
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_typelist {
    let output : any Vx_Core.Type_typelist = vtypedef.allowtypes()
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_and(
    _ val1 : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean,
    _ val2 : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
    if (val1.vx_boolean() && val2.vx_boolean()) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    }    
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_any_from_any<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    guard let output = value as? T else {
      print("Type mismatch: expected \(T.self), got \(type(of: value))")
      return generic_any_1.vx_empty() as! T
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_any_from_any_context<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ context : any Vx_Core.Type_context,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    guard let output = value as? T else {
      print("Type mismatch: expected \(T.self), got \(type(of: value))")
      return generic_any_1.vx_empty() as! T
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_any_from_any_async<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ future : Vx_Core.Future
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    let output : Vx_Core.Future = future.map(generic_any_1, { value in
      return Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
    })
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1, func, args...)
  public static func vx_any_from_func<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fnc : any Vx_Core.Type_replfunc,
    _ anylist : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> T {
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fnc.vx_repl(anylist)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, val)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_any_from_list<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ index : any Vx_Core.Type_int
  ) -> T {
    var output : T
    let intindex : Int = index.vx_int()
    let intsize : Int = values.vx_list().count
    if (intindex <= intsize) {
      let listvalue : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = values.vx_list()
      let value : any Vx_Core.Type_any = listvalue[intindex - 1]
      output = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_from_list_start_reduce(any-1, list-2, any-1, any<-reduce)
  public static func vx_any_from_list_start_reduce<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ list : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ valstart : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ fn_reduce : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_reduce
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = valstart as! T
    let listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = list.vx_list()
    for item in listval {
      let reduced : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_reduce.vx_any_from_reduce(
        generic_any_1, output, item)
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(
        generic_any_1, reduced)
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_from_list_start_reduce_next(any-1, list-2, any-1, any<-reduce-next)
  public static func vx_any_from_list_start_reduce_next<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ list : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ valstart : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ fn_reduce_next : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_reduce_next
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = valstart as! T
    let listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = list.vx_list()
    var current : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var first = true
    for next : any Vx_Core.Type_any in listval {
      if first {
        first = false
      } else {
        let reduced : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_reduce_next.vx_any_from_reduce_next(
          generic_any_1,
          output,
          current,
          next
        )
        output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, reduced)
      }
      current = next
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_from_map(generic_any_1, map, string)
  public static func vx_any_from_map<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ valuemap : any Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ key : any Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = Vx_Core.vx_empty(generic_any_1)
    var skey = key.vx_string()
    if skey.hasPrefix(":") {
      skey.removeFirst()
    }
    let val : any Vx_Core.Type_any = valuemap.vx_map().getOrElse(skey, output)
    output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, val)
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_from_map_start_reduce(any-1, map-2, any-1, any<-any-key-value)
  public static func vx_any_from_map_start_reduce<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ map : any Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ start : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ fn_reduce : Vx_Core.Func_any_from_any_key_value
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = start as! T
    var mapval : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any> = map.vx_map()
    for skey : String in mapval.keys() {
      let key : any Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(skey)
      let value : any Vx_Core.Type_any = mapval.get(skey)
      let reduced : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_reduce.vx_any_from_any_key_value(
        generic_any_1, output, key, value)
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(
        generic_any_1, reduced)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_any_from_struct<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ vstruct : any Vx_Core.Type_struct,
    _ key : any Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> T {
    let value : Vx_Core.Type_any = vstruct.vx_any(key)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)    
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_first_from_list_fn(generic_any_1, list, fn_any)
  public static func vx_any_first_from_list_fn(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ list : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any : (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let empty : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_any = empty
    let listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = list.vx_list()
    for any : any Vx_Core.Type_any in listany {
      let value : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_any(any)
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, empty) {
        output = value
        break
      }
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_any_first_from_list_fn(generic_any_1, list, fn_any)
  public static func vx_any_first_from_list_fn<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ list : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any : (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> T
  ) -> T {
    let raw = Vx_Core.vx_any_first_from_list_fn(
      generic_any_1 as any Vx_Core.Type_any,
      list,
      fn_any
    )
    return Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_any_1, raw)
  }

  public static func vx_anylist_from_arraystring(
    _ arraystring : [String]
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_anylist {
    var listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
    for svalue : String in arraystring {
      let value : any Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(svalue)
      listany.append(value)
    }
    let output : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist = Vx_Core.vx_new_anylist(
      listany
    )
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_arrayany_from_anylist(
    _ list : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> [any Vx_Core.Type_any] {
    let listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = list.vx_list()
    let output : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = listany
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_arraylist_from_array(
    _ items : [any Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> [any Vx_Core.Type_any] {
    let output : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = items
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_async(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    Vx_Core.Future.resolved(generic_any_1, value)
  }

  public static func vx_async_empty(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    Vx_Core.Future.resolved(
      generic_any_1,
      generic_any_1.vx_empty()
    )
  }

  public static func vx_async_from_async(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ future : Vx_Core.Future
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    future.map(generic_any_1, { value in
      value
    })
  }

  public static func vx_async_from_async_fn(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ future : Vx_Core.Future,
    _ fn : @escaping (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    future.map(
      generic_any_1,
      { value in
        fn(value)
      }
    )
  }

  public static func vx_async_new_from_value(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    let generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any = value.vx_type()
    return Vx_Core.vx_async(generic_any_1, value)
  }

  public static func vx_async_arraylist_from_arraylist_async(
    _ generic_any_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ listFuture : [Vx_Core.Future]
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    return Vx_Core.Future.all(generic_any_1, listFuture)
  }

  // vx_boolean_from_string_ends(string, string)
  public static func vx_boolean_from_string_ends(
    _ text: String,
    _ ends: String
  ) -> Bool {
    return text.hasSuffix(ends)
  }

  // vx_boolean_from_string_find(string, string)
  public static func vx_boolean_from_string_find(
    _ text: String,
    _ find: String
  ) -> Bool {
    return text.contains(find)
  }

  // vx_boolean_from_string_starts(string, string)
  public static func vx_boolean_from_string_starts(
    _ text: String,
    _ starts: String
  ) -> Bool {
    return text.hasPrefix(starts)
  }

  // vx_boolean_write_from_map_name_value(map, string, any)
  public static func vx_boolean_write_from_map_name_value(
    _ valuemap : Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ name : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    return valuemap.vx_set(name, value)
  }

  // vx_compare(any, any)
  public static func vx_compare(
    _ val1 : Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ val2 : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var intResult = 0
    if let num1 = val1 as? Vx_Core.Type_number,
      let num2 = val2 as? Vx_Core.Type_number {
      let float1 = Vx_Core.vx_new(Vx_Core.t_float, [num1]).vx_float()
      let float2 = Vx_Core.vx_new(Vx_Core.t_float, [num2]).vx_float()
      if float1 < float2 {
        intResult = -1
      } else if float1 > float2 {
        intResult = 1
      }
    } else {
      let string1 = Vx_Core.f_string_from_any(val1).vx_string()
      let string2 = Vx_Core.f_string_from_any(val2).vx_string()
      let compare = string1.compare(string2)
      if compare == .orderedDescending {
        intResult = 1
      } else if compare == .orderedAscending {
        intResult = -1
      }
    }
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_int(intResult)
  }

  // vx_constdef<-any(any)
  public static func vx_constdef_from_any(
    _ value: Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_constdef {
    return value.vx_constdef()
  }

  public static func vx_contains(
    _ text : any Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ find : any Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.e_boolean
    let check : Bool = vx_boolean_from_string_find(
      text.vx_string(),
      find.vx_string())
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_boolean(check)
    return output
  }

  // vx_contains(list-1, any)
  public static func vx_contains_1<T: Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ values: T,
    _ find: Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    let listValues = values.vx_list()
    var result = false
    for item in listValues {
      let isEq = Vx_Core.f_eq(item, find)
      if isEq.vx_boolean() {
        result = true
        break
      }
    }
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_boolean(result)
  }

  public static func vx_divide(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_number,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_number
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_number {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_number = Vx_Core.e_number
    let float1 : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num1)
    let float2 : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num2)
    if (float1 == 0) {
    } else if (float2 == 0) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_notanumber
    } else {
      let result : Float = float1 / float2
      output = Vx_Core.vx_new_float(result)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_eq(
    _ val1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ val2 : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.e_boolean
    var isequal : Bool = false
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(val1, val2) {
      isequal = true
    } else {
      let strval1 : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.f_string_from_any(val1)
      let strval2 : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.f_string_from_any(val2)
      if strval1.vx_string() == strval2.vx_string() {
        isequal = true
      }
    }
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_boolean(isequal)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_eqeq(
    _ val1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ val2 : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(val1, val2) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(val1.vx_msgblock(), Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
    } else if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(val2.vx_msgblock(), Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
    } else {
      let type1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any = val1.vx_type()
      let type2 : any Vx_Core.Type_any = val2.vx_type()
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(type1, type2) {
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type1, Vx_Core.t_int) {
        let valint1 : any Vx_Core.Type_int = val1 as! Vx_Core.Type_int
        let valint2 : any Vx_Core.Type_int = val1 as! Vx_Core.Type_int
        if (valint1.vx_int() == valint2.vx_int()) {
          output = Vx_Core.c_true
        }
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type1, Vx_Core.t_float) {
        let valfloat1 : any Vx_Core.Type_float = val1 as! Vx_Core.Type_float
        let valfloat2 : any Vx_Core.Type_float = val2 as! Vx_Core.Type_float
        if (valfloat1.vx_float() == valfloat2.vx_float()) {
          output = Vx_Core.c_true
        }
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type1, Vx_Core.t_decimal) {
        let valdecimal1 : any Vx_Core.Type_decimal = val1 as! Vx_Core.Type_decimal
        let valdecimal2 : any Vx_Core.Type_decimal = val2 as! Vx_Core.Type_decimal
        if (valdecimal1.vx_string() == valdecimal2.vx_string()) {
          output = Vx_Core.c_true
        }
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type1, Vx_Core.t_string) {
        let valstring1 : any Vx_Core.Type_string = val1 as! Vx_Core.Type_string
        let valstring2 : any Vx_Core.Type_string = val2 as! Vx_Core.Type_string
        if (valstring1.vx_string() == valstring2.vx_string()) {
          output = Vx_Core.c_true
        }
      }
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_first_from_list_any_from_any<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any_from_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_any
  ) -> T {
    var output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    let listvalue : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = values.vx_list()
    for value : any Vx_Core.Type_any in listvalue {
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_nothing) {
        output = fn_any_from_any.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
        break
      }
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_float_from_int(
    _ ival : Int
  ) -> Float {
    return Float(ival)
  }

  // vx_float_from_number(number)
  public static func vx_float_from_number(
    _ num: Vx_Core.Type_number
  ) -> Float {
    var output: Float = 0
    let type: Vx_Core.Type_any = num.vx_type()
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type, Vx_Core.t_float) {
      let floatval : Vx_Core.Type_float =
        Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(Vx_Core.t_float, num)
      output = floatval.vx_float()
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type, Vx_Core.t_int) {
      let intval : Vx_Core.Type_int =
        Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(Vx_Core.t_int, num)
      output = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_int(intval.vx_int())
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(type, Vx_Core.t_decimal) {
      let decval : Vx_Core.Type_decimal =
        Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(Vx_Core.t_decimal, num)
      output = decval.vx_float()
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_float_from_string(
    _ text : String
  ) -> Float {
    var output : Float = 0
    if let f = Float(text) {
      output = f
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_float_from_string(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_float {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_float = Vx_Core.e_float
    let fval : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_string(text.vx_string())
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_float(fval)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_funcdef_from_func(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_func
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_funcdef {
    return value.vx_funcdef()
  }

  // vx_global_package_set(string, map<any>, map<any>, map<func>)
  public static func vx_global_package_set(
    _ pkgname : String,
    _ maptype : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any>,
    _ mapconst : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any>,
    _ mapfunc : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_func>
  ) {
    let typemap = Vx_Core.Class_typemap()
    typemap.vx_p_map = maptype
    let constmap = Vx_Core.Class_constmap()
    constmap.vx_p_map = mapconst
    let funcmap = Vx_Core.Class_funcmap()
    funcmap.vx_p_map = mapfunc
    let global = Vx_Core.c_global as! Vx_Core.Class_project
    var packagemap = global.packagemap() as! Vx_Core.Class_packagemap
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(packagemap, Vx_Core.e_packagemap) {
      packagemap = Vx_Core.Class_packagemap()
      global.vx_p_packagemap = packagemap
    }
    var mappackage = Vx_Core.MapMutable<Vx_Core.Type_package>(
      packagemap.vx_p_map
    )
    let pkg = Vx_Core.Class_package()
    pkg.vx_p_constmap = constmap
    pkg.vx_p_typemap = typemap
    pkg.vx_p_funcmap = funcmap
    mappackage.put(pkgname, pkg)
    packagemap.vx_p_map = Vx_Core.vx_mapimmutable(mappackage)
  }

  public static func vx_if<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ clause : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean,
    _ thenval : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    var output : T
    if (clause.vx_boolean()) {
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, thenval)
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_if_1<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ clause : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean,
    _ thenval : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ elseval : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    var output : T
    if (clause.vx_boolean()) {
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, thenval)
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, elseval)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_if_2<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ thenelselist : any Vx_Core.Type_thenelselist
  ) -> T {
    var output : T
    let fn_any : any Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.vx_any_first_from_list_fn(
      Vx_Core.t_any_from_func,
      thenelselist,
      { (anyvalue : any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any in
        var fnany : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func = Vx_Core.e_any_from_func
        if let thenelse = anyvalue as? any Vx_Core.Type_thenelse {
          let code : any Vx_Core.Type_string = thenelse.code()
          let scode : String = code.vx_string()
          if scode == ":then" {
            let fn_cond : any Vx_Core.Func_boolean_from_func = thenelse.fn_cond()
            let cond : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = fn_cond.vx_boolean_from_func()
            if cond.vx_boolean() == true {
              fnany = thenelse.fn_any()
            }
          } else if scode == ":else" {
            fnany = thenelse.fn_any()
          }
        }
        return fnany
      }
    )
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func) {
      output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)      
    } else if let fn = fn_any as? Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func {
      output = fn.vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1)
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)      
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_int_from_float(
    _ fval : Float
  ) -> Int {
    let output = Int(fval)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_int_from_string(
    _ text : String
  ) -> Int {
    var output : Int = 0
    if let i = Int(text) {
      output = i
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_int_from_string(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let stext : String = text.vx_string()
    switch stext {
    case "notanumber":
      output = Vx_Core.c_notanumber
    case "infinity":
      output = Vx_Core.c_infinity
    case "neginfinity":
      output = Vx_Core.c_neginfinity
    default:
      let ival : Int = Vx_Core.vx_int_from_string(text.vx_string())
      output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(ival)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_is_empty(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
    if (text.vx_string().count == 0) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.c_false
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_is_empty_1(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
    if (Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, value.vx_empty())) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.c_false
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_is_endswith(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ find : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
    let stext : String = text.vx_string()
    let sfind : String = find.vx_string()
    if stext.hasSuffix(sfind) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.c_false
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_is_float(string)
  public static func vx_is_float(
    _ text : String
  ) -> Bool {
    return Double(text) != nil
  }

  public static func vx_is_float(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
    if value is Vx_Core.Type_number {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if let valuestring = value as? any Vx_Core.Type_string {
      let isfloat : Bool = Vx_Core.vx_is_float(valuestring.vx_string())
      if isfloat {
        output = Vx_Core.c_true
      }
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_is_func(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
    if value is Vx_Core.Type_func {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else {
      output = Vx_Core.c_false
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_is_int(string)
  public static func vx_is_int(
    _ text : String
  ) -> Bool {
    var output : Bool = false
    if text == "notanumber" {
      output = true
    } else if text == "infinity" {
      output = true
    } else if text == "neginfinity" {
      output = true
    } else {
      output = Int(text) != nil
    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_is_int(any)
  public static func vx_is_int(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var result : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
    if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_infinity) {
      result = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_neginfinity) {
      result = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_notanumber) {
      result = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if value is Vx_Core.Type_int {
      result = Vx_Core.c_true
    } else if let valfloat = value as? Vx_Core.Type_float {
      let floatval : Float = valfloat.vx_float()
      let intval : Int = Vx_Core.vx_int_from_float(floatval)
      if floatval == Vx_Core.vx_float_from_int(intval) {
        result = Vx_Core.c_true
      }
    } else if let valdec = value as? Vx_Core.Type_decimal {
      let strval : String = valdec.vx_string()
      let floatval : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_string(strval)
      let intval : Int = Vx_Core.vx_int_from_float(floatval)
      if floatval == Vx_Core.vx_float_from_int(intval) {
        result = Vx_Core.c_true
      }
    } else if let valstr = value as? Vx_Core.Type_string {
      let strval : String = valstr.vx_string()
      if Vx_Core.vx_is_int(strval) {
        result = Vx_Core.c_true
      }
    }
    return result
  }

  public static func vx_issame(
    _ val1 : Any?,
    _ val2 : Any?
  ) -> Bool {
    var output : Bool = false
    if (val1 == nil) || (val2 == nil) {
      output = (val1 == nil) && (val2 == nil)
    } else if let oval1 = val1 as AnyObject?, let oval2 = val2 as AnyObject? {
      output = (oval1 === oval2)
    } else {
      switch (val1, val2) {
      case let (x as String, y as String):
        output = (x == y)
      case let (x as Int, y as Int):
        output = (x == y)
      case let (x as Float, y as Float):
        output = (x == y)
      case let (x as Double, y as Double):
        output = (x == y)
      case let (x as Bool, y as Bool):
        output = (x == y)
      default:
        break
      }
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_length(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let len : Int = text.vx_string().count
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(len)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_length_1(
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_list
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let intresult : Int = values.vx_list().count
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(intresult)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_let<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fn_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func
  ) -> T {
    return fn_any.vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1)
  }

  public static func vx_let_async<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fn_any_async : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func_async
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    return fn_any_async.vx_any_from_func_async(generic_any_1)
  }

  public static func vx_list_from_list_1<X : Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ generic_list_1 : X,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any_from_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_any
  ) -> X {
    var output : X = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_list_1)
    let list_result = values.vx_list().map {
      fn_any_from_any.vx_any_from_any(Vx_Core.t_any, $0)
    }
    output = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(
      generic_list_1,
      generic_list_1.vx_new(list_result))
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_list_from_list_async<X : Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ generic_list_1 : X,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any_from_any_async : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_any_async
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    let listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = values.vx_list()
    var futures : [Vx_Core.Future] = []
    for value in listany {
      let future = fn_any_from_any_async.vx_any_from_any_async(
        Vx_Core.t_any, value)
      futures.append(future)
    }
    let output : Vx_Core.Future = Vx_Core.vx_async_arraylist_from_arraylist_async(
      generic_list_1, futures)
    return output
  }

  // vx_list_from_list_intany(generic_list_1, list-2, any<-int-any)
  public static func vx_list_from_list_intany<X : Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ generic_list_1 : X,
    _ valuelist : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any_from_int_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_int_any
  ) -> X {
    var output : X
    let listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = valuelist.vx_list()
    if listany.count == 0 {
      output = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_list_1)
    } else {
      var listout : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
      var i : Int = 0
      for value in listany {
        i += 1
        let vali : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(i)
        let outval : any Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_any_from_int_any.vx_any_from_int_any(
          Vx_Core.t_any, vali, value
        )
        listout.append(outval)
      }
      output = Vx_Core.vx_new_list(
        generic_list_1,
        listout
      )
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_list_from_map_1<X : Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ generic_list_1 : X,
    _ valuemap : any Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ fn_any_from_key_value : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_key_value
  ) -> X {
    let map_value : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any> =
      valuemap.vx_map()
    let fn_key_value : (String, any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any = {
      (key : String, value : any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any in
      let valkey : Vx_Core.Type_string =
        Vx_Core.vx_new_string(key)
      let output_1 : any Vx_Core.Type_any =
        fn_any_from_key_value.vx_any_from_key_value(
          Vx_Core.t_any,
          valkey,
          value
        )
      return output_1
    }
    let listresult : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] =
      Vx_Core.arraylist_from_linkedhashmap_fn(
        map_value,
        fn_key_value
      )
    let anylist : any Vx_Core.Type_any =
      generic_list_1.vx_new(listresult)
    let output : X =
      Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(
        generic_list_1,
        anylist
      )
    return output
  }

  // vx_log(_ values : Any...)
  public static func vx_log(
    _ values : Any...
  ) {
    for value in values {
      var text = ""
      if let valstring = value as? Vx_Core.Type_string {
        text = valstring.vx_string()
      } else if let valany = value as? Vx_Core.Type_any {
        let valstring2 = Vx_Core.f_string_from_any(valany)
        text = valstring2.vx_string()
      } else {
        text = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_object(value)
      }
      print(text)
    }
  }

  // vx_log(_ value : Vx_Core.Type_any)
  public static func vx_log(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let text : String = vx_string_from_any(value)
    print(text)
    return value
  }

  // vx_log_1(_ text : String, value : Vx_Core.Type_any)
  public static func vx_log_1<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ text : String,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    let svalue : String = vx_string_from_any(value)
    print(text)
    print(svalue)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
    return output
  }

  // vx_log_1(_ text : String, value : Vx_Core.Type_any)
  public static func vx_log_1<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> T {
    let stext : String = text.vx_string()
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_log_1(generic_any_1, stext, value)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_map_from_list<N : Vx_Core.Type_map>(
    _ generic_map_1 : N,
    _ vallist : any Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ fn_any_from_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_any
  ) -> N {
    let listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = vallist.vx_list()
    let fn_string_from_any : (any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> Vx_Core.Type_string = {
      (value : any Vx_Core.Type_any) -> Vx_Core.Type_string in
      let output_string : Vx_Core.Type_string = fn_any_from_any.vx_any_from_any(
        Vx_Core.t_string, value
      )
      return output_string
    }
    let mapresult : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any> = Vx_Core.vx_map_from_list_fn(
      listval, fn_string_from_any
    )
    let mapval : any Vx_Core.Type_map = generic_map_1.vx_new_from_map(
      mapresult
    )
    let output = Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(
      generic_map_1,
      mapval
    )
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_map_from_list_fn<T>(
    _ listval : [T],
    _ fn_any_from_any : (T) -> Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Map<T> {
    var map : Vx_Core.MapMutable<T> = Vx_Core.MapMutable<T>()
    for value : T in listval {
      let valkey : any Vx_Core.Type_string = fn_any_from_any(value)
      let key : String = valkey.vx_string()
      map.put(key, value)
    }
    let output = Vx_Core.vx_mapimmutable<T>(map)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_map_from_map_1<N : Vx_Core.Type_map>(
    _ generic_map_1 : N,
    _ valuemap : any Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ fn_any_from_key_value : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_key_value
  ) -> N {
    let output : N = Vx_Core.vx_map_from_map_fn(
      generic_map_1,
      valuemap,
      fn_any_from_key_value)
    return output
  }

  // vx_map_from_map_fn(generic_map, map, fn_any_from_key_value)
  public static func vx_map_from_map_fn<T : Vx_Core.Type_map>(
    _ generic_map_1 : T,
    _ valuemap : any Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ fn_any_from_key_value : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_key_value
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_map_1)
    let mapvalue : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any> = valuemap.vx_map()
    if (mapvalue.size() > 0) {
      let typedef : Vx_Core.Type_typedef = Vx_Core.f_typedef_from_any(
        generic_map_1
      )
      let allowtypes : Vx_Core.Type_typelist = Vx_Core.f_allowtypes_from_typedef(
        typedef
      )
      let lallowtypes : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = allowtypes.vx_list()
      let keys : [String] = mapvalue.keys()
      var mapmutable : Vx_Core.MapMutable<any Vx_Core.Type_any> =
        Vx_Core.MapMutable<any Vx_Core.Type_any>()
      for key : String in keys {
        let valuemaybe : Vx_Core.Type_any? = mapvalue.get(key)
        if let value : any Vx_Core.Type_any = valuemaybe {
          let stringkey : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(key)
          let chgvalue : Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_any_from_key_value.vx_any_from_key_value(
            Vx_Core.t_any, stringkey, value
          )
          let chgtype : Vx_Core.Type_any = chgvalue.vx_type()
          if lallowtypes.contains(where: { Vx_Core.vx_issame($0, chgtype) }) {
            mapmutable.put(key, chgvalue)
          }
        }
      }
      let map = Vx_Core.vx_mapimmutable(mapmutable)
      output = Vx_Core.vx_new_map(
        generic_map_1, map
      )
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_minus_1(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_number,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_number
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_number {
    let result : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num1) - Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num2)
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_float(result)    
  }

  public static func vx_minus(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_int,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_int
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let result : Int = num1.vx_int() - num2.vx_int()
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(result)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_multiply(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_int,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_int
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let result : Int = num1.vx_int() * num2.vx_int()
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(result)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_multiply_1(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_number,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_number
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_number {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_number = Vx_Core.e_number
    let result : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num1) * Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num2)
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_float(result)
    return output
  }

  // vx_msg_from_error(text: String)
  public static func vx_msg_from_error(
    _ text: String
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    let output = Vx_Core.Class_msg()
    output.vx_p_text = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(text)
    output.vx_p_severity = Vx_Core.c_msg_severe
    return output
  }

  // vx_msg_from_error(path: String, code: String, detail: Type_any)
  public static func vx_msg_from_error(
    _ path : String,
    _ code : String,
    _ detail : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    let output = Vx_Core.Class_msg()
    output.vx_p_path = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(path)
    output.vx_p_code = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(code)
    output.vx_p_detail = detail
    output.vx_p_severity = Vx_Core.c_msg_severe
    return output
  }

  // vx_msg_from_exception(text : String, err : Error)
  public static func vx_msg_from_exception(
    _ text : String,
    _ err : Error
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msg {
    let output = Vx_Core.Class_msg()
    output.vx_p_text = Vx_Core.vx_new_string(text)
    output.vx_p_severity = Vx_Core.c_msg_severe
    output.err = err
    Vx_Core.vx_log(output)
    return output
  }

  // vx_msgblock_from_any(value : Type_any)
  public static func vx_msgblock_from_any(
    _ value: any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
    return value.vx_msgblock()
  }

  // vx_msgblock_from_copy_arrayval(copy : Type_any, values : Type_any...)
  public static func vx_msgblock_from_copy_arrayval(
    _ copy : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ values : [Any]
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_msgblock {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.e_msgblock
    var listmsgblock : [Vx_Core.Type_msgblock] = []
    let msgblock = copy.vx_msgblock()
    if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(msgblock, Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
       listmsgblock.append(msgblock)
    }
    for subobj in values {
      if let subval = subobj as? any Vx_Core.Type_any {
        let submsgblock = subval.vx_msgblock()
        if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(submsgblock, Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
            listmsgblock.append(submsgblock)
        }
      }
    }
    switch listmsgblock.count {
    case 0:
      break
    case 1:
      output = listmsgblock[0]
    default:
      let msgblocks = Vx_Core.Class_msgblocklist()
      msgblocks.vx_p_list = listmsgblock
      let outputclass = Vx_Core.Class_msgblock()
      outputclass.vx_p_msgblocks = msgblocks
      output = outputclass
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_new_anylist(
    _ listany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_anylist {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Class_anylist = Vx_Core.Class_anylist()
    output.vx_p_list = Vx_Core.vx_listimmutable(listany)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_new_boolean(
    _ isval : Bool
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    return isval ? Vx_Core.c_true : Vx_Core.c_false
  }

  public static func vx_new_decimal(
    _ text: String
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_decimal {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_decimal = Vx_Core.e_decimal
    if text == "0" || text == "0.0" {
    } else {
      var work = Vx_Core.Class_decimal()
      work.vxdecimal = text
      output = work
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_new_float(
    _ fval: Float
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_float {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_float = Vx_Core.e_float
    if fval != 0 {
      var work = Vx_Core.Class_float()
      work.vxfloat = fval
      output = work
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_new_from_type<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ type : T,
    _ values : any Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> T {
    let arrayany : [any Vx_Core.Type_any] = Vx_Core.vx_arrayany_from_anylist(
      values
    )
    let anyvalue : any Vx_Core.Type_any = type.vx_new(arrayany)
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(type, anyvalue)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_new_int(
    _ ival: Int
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    if ival != 0 {
      var work = Vx_Core.Class_int()
      work.vxint = ival
      output = work

    }
    return output
  }

  // vx_new_list(T, [any])
  public static func vx_new_list<T : Vx_Core.Type_list>(
    _ generic_list_1 : T,
    _ listval : [any Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> T {
    let anylist : Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_list_1.vx_new(listval)
    return Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_list_1, anylist)
  }

  // vx_new_map(T, [String: any])
  public static func vx_new_map<T : Vx_Core.Type_map>(
    _ generic_map_1 : T,
    _ mapval : Vx_Core.Map<any Vx_Core.Type_any>
  ) -> T {
    let anymap : any Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_map_1.vx_new_from_map(mapval)
    return Vx_Core.f_any_from_any(generic_map_1, anymap)
  }

  public static func vx_new_string(
    _ text : String
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_string {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.e_string
    if !text.isEmpty {
      var work = Vx_Core.Class_string()
      work.vxstring = text
      output = work
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_not(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.e_boolean
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_boolean(!value.vx_boolean())
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_or(
    _ val1 : Vx_Core.Type_boolean,
    _ val2 : Vx_Core.Type_boolean
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_boolean = Vx_Core.c_false
    if (val1.vx_boolean() || val2.vx_boolean()) {
      output = Vx_Core.c_true
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_plus(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_int,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_int
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_int {
    var output : any Vx_Core.Type_int = Vx_Core.e_int
    let result : Int = num1.vx_int() + num2.vx_int()
    output = Vx_Core.vx_new_int(result)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_plus_1(
    _ num1 : any Vx_Core.Type_number,
    _ num2 : any Vx_Core.Type_number
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_number {
    let result : Float = Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num1) + Vx_Core.vx_float_from_number(num2)
    let output : any Vx_Core.Type_number = Vx_Core.vx_new_float(result)    
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_resolve<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fn_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    if fn_any == nil {
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func) {
    } else {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_any = fn_any.vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1)
      output = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, value)
    }
    return output    
  }

  public static func vx_resolve_1<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fn_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    if (fn_any == nil) {
    } else if (Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func)) {
    } else {
      output = fn_any.vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1)
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_resolve_async<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ fn_any : any Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func_async
  ) -> Vx_Core.Future {
    var output : Vx_Core.Future = Vx_Core.Future(
      Vx_Core.vx_empty(generic_any_1))
    if fn_any == nil {
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func_async) {
    } else {
      output = fn_any.vx_any_from_func_async(generic_any_1)
    }
    return output    
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_any(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> String {
    return Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(value, 0, false)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_any_indent(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ indent : Int,
    _ linefeed : Bool
  ) -> String {
    let indenttext : String = Vx_Core.vx_string_repeat(" ", indent)
    var output : String = ""
    if indent > 50 {
      output = "Error: Max Depth Exceeded"
    } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, value.vx_type()) {
      if let valuefunc = value as? Vx_Core.Type_func {
        let funcdef = valuefunc.vx_funcdef()
        output =
          funcdef.pkgname().vx_string() + "/" +
          funcdef.name().vx_string()
      } else {
        let typedef = value.vx_typedef()
        var typedefname : String = typedef.name().vx_string()
        let pkgname = typedef.pkgname().vx_string()
        if (pkgname != "vx/core") {
          typedefname = pkgname + "/" + typedefname
        }
        output = typedefname
      }
    } else if let valbool = value as? Vx_Core.Type_boolean {
      output = valbool.vx_boolean() ? "true" : "false"
    } else if let valdec = value as? Vx_Core.Type_decimal {
      output = valdec.vx_string()
    } else if let valfloat = value as? Vx_Core.Type_float {
      output = String(valfloat.vx_float())
      if output.hasSuffix(".0") {
        output.removeLast(2)
      }
    } else if let valint = value as? Vx_Core.Type_int {
      if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_notanumber) {
        output = "notanumber"
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_infinity) {
        output = "infinity"
      } else if Vx_Core.vx_issame(value, Vx_Core.c_neginfinity) {
        output = "neginfinity"
      } else {
        output = String(valint.vx_int())
      }
    } else if let valstring = value as? Vx_Core.Type_string {
      var sval = valstring.vx_string()
      if !sval.contains("\"") {
        sval = "\"\(sval)\""
      } else {
        sval = "`\(sval)`"
      }
      if valstring.vx_msgblock() !== Vx_Core.e_msgblock {
        let msgtext = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
          valstring.vx_msgblock(), indent, linefeed)
        output  = "\n\(indenttext)(string"
        output += "\n\(indenttext) \(sval)"
        output += "\n\(indenttext) \(msgtext))"
      } else {
        output = sval
      }
    } else if value.vx_constdef() !== Vx_Core.e_constdef {
      let constdef = value.vx_constdef()
      let pkg = constdef.pkgname().vx_string()
      let name = constdef.name().vx_string()
      output = (pkg == "vx/core") ? name : "\(pkg)/\(name)"
    } else if let vallist = value as? Vx_Core.Type_list {
      let typedef = value.vx_typedef()
      var typedefname : String = typedef.name().vx_string()
      let pkgname = typedef.pkgname().vx_string()
      if (pkgname != "vx/core") {
        typedefname = pkgname + "/" + typedefname
      }
      let indent2 = indent + 1
      for valsub in vallist.vx_list() {
        let valtext = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(valsub, indent2, linefeed)
        output += "\n \(indenttext)\(valtext)"
      }
      if vallist.vx_msgblock() !== Vx_Core.e_msgblock {
        let msgtext = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
          vallist.vx_msgblock(), indent2, linefeed)
        output += "\n\(indenttext) :msgblock\n  \(indenttext)\(msgtext)"
      }
      output = "(\(typedefname)\(output))"
    } else if let valmap = value as? Vx_Core.Type_map {
      let typedef = value.vx_typedef()
      var typedefname : String = typedef.name().vx_string()
      let pkgname = typedef.pkgname().vx_string()
      if (pkgname != "vx/core") {
        typedefname = pkgname + "/" + typedefname
      }
      let indent2 = indent + 2
      for skey in valmap.vx_map().keys() {
        var key = skey
        let valsub = valmap.vx_map().get(key)
        if !key.hasPrefix(":") {
          key = ":\(key)"
        }
        var strval = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(valsub, indent2, linefeed)
        if strval.contains("\n") {
          strval = "\n  \(indenttext)\(strval)"
        } else {
          strval = " \(strval)"
        }
        output += "\n\(indenttext) \(key)\(strval)"
      }
      if valmap.vx_msgblock() !== Vx_Core.e_msgblock {
        let msgtext = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
          valmap.vx_msgblock(), indent2, linefeed)
        output += "\n\(indenttext) :msgblock\n  \(indenttext)\(msgtext)"
      }
      output = "(\(typedefname)\(output))"
    } else if let valstruct = value as? Vx_Core.Type_struct {
      let typedef = value.vx_typedef()
      var typedefname : String = typedef.name().vx_string()
      let pkgname = typedef.pkgname().vx_string()
      if (pkgname != "vx/core") {
        typedefname = pkgname + "/" + typedefname
      }
      var indentint2 = indent
      indentint2 += 2
      let mapval2 = valstruct.vx_map()
      let keys2 : [String] = mapval2.keys()
      for skey in keys2 {
        var key : String = skey
        let valsub2 = mapval2.getOrElse(
          key, Vx_Core.e_any
        )
        if !Vx_Core.f_is_empty_1(valsub2).vx_boolean() {
          if !key.starts(with: ":") {
            key = ":" + key
          }
          var strval2 : String = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
            valsub2, indentint2, linefeed
          )
          if strval2.contains("\n") {
            strval2 = "\n  " + indenttext + strval2
          } else {
            strval2 = " " + strval2
          }
          output += "\n" + indenttext + " " + key + strval2
        }
      }
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(valstruct.vx_msgblock(), Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
        let msgtext2 : String = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
          valstruct.vx_msgblock(), indentint2, linefeed
        )
        output += "\n" + indenttext + " :msgblock\n  " + indenttext + msgtext2
      }
      output = "(" + typedefname + output + ")"
    } else if let valfunc = value as? Vx_Core.Type_func {
      let funcname = Vx_Core.f_funcname_from_funcdef(
        valfunc.vx_funcdef()
      ).vx_string()
      output = funcname
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(valfunc.vx_msgblock(), Vx_Core.e_msgblock) {
        let msgtext = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
          valfunc.vx_msgblock(), indent, linefeed
        )
        output += "\n\(indenttext) :msgblock\n  \(indenttext)\(msgtext)"
      }
      output = "(\(output))"
    }
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_any_indent(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ indent : any Vx_Core.Type_int,
    _ linefeed : any Vx_Core.Type_boolean
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_string {
    let soutput = Vx_Core.vx_string_from_any_indent(
      value,
      indent.vx_int(),
      linefeed.vx_boolean()
    )
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_string(soutput)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_float(
    _ fval : Float
  ) -> String {
    return String(fval)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_int(
    _ ival : Int
  ) -> String {
    return String(ival)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_object(
    _ obj: Any
  ) -> String {
    return String(describing: obj)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_string_find_replace(
    _ text : String,
    _ find : String,
    _ replace : String
  ) -> String {
    guard !find.isEmpty else { return text }
    return text.replacingOccurrences(of: find, with: replace)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_string_find_replace(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ find : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ replace : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_string {
    let stext = vx_string_from_string_find_replace(
      text.vx_string(),
      find.vx_string(),
      replace.vx_string()
    )
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_string(stext)
  }

  public static func vx_string_from_string_start_end(
    _ text : String,
    _ start : Int,
    _ end : Int
  ) -> String {
    let maxlen = text.count
    var endval = end < 0 ? end + maxlen : end
    guard start >= 1, start <= endval, start <= maxlen else {
      return ""
    }
    endval = min(endval, maxlen)
    let s = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: start - 1)
    let e = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: endval)
    return String(text[s..<e])
  }

  public static func vx_string_repeat(
    _ text : String,
    _ num : Int
  ) -> String {
    guard num > 0 else { return "" }
    return String(repeating: text, count: num)
  }

  public static func vx_string_repeat(
    _ text : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ num : Vx_Core.Type_int
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_string {
    return Vx_Core.vx_new_string(
      Vx_Core.vx_string_repeat(
        text.vx_string(),
        num.vx_int()
      )
    )
  }

  public static func vx_switch<
    T : Vx_Core.Type_any,
    U : Vx_Core.Type_any
  >(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ value : U,
    _ thenelselist : Vx_Core.Type_thenelselist
  ) -> T {
    var output : T = Vx_Core.f_empty(generic_any_1)
    var fn_any : Vx_Core.Func_any_from_func = Vx_Core.e_any_from_func
    for thenelse in thenelselist.vx_listthenelse() {
      let code = thenelse.code().vx_string()
      switch code {
      case ":case":
        if Vx_Core.f_eq(value, thenelse.value()).vx_boolean() {
          fn_any = thenelse.fn_any()
        }
      case ":casemany":
        if Vx_Core.f_contains_1(thenelse.values(), value).vx_boolean() {
          fn_any = thenelse.fn_any()
        }
      case ":else":
        fn_any = thenelse.fn_any()
      default:
        break
      }
      if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func) {
        break
      }
    }
    if !Vx_Core.vx_issame(fn_any, Vx_Core.e_any_from_func) {
      output = fn_any.vx_any_from_func(generic_any_1)
    }
    return output
  }

  // Warning!: Blocking
  public static func vx_sync_from_async<T : Vx_Core.Type_any>(
    _ generic_any_1 : T,
    _ future : Vx_Core.Future
  ) -> T {
    let result : any Vx_Core.Type_any = future.getValueSync()
    let output : T = Vx_Core.vx_any_from_any(generic_any_1, result)
    return output
  }

  public static func vx_type_from_any(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_any {
    return value.vx_type()
  }

  public static func vx_typedef_from_type(
    _ value : any Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> any Vx_Core.Type_typedef {
    return value.vx_typedef()
  }
